We plan to update the game to version 1.1.08: Starlit Blaze on 【UTC 2026/6/3 06:00】. The servers will be down for an estimated 【3 hours】 during the update. We apologize for any inconvenience this might cause and will send you a reward as compensation once the update is complete.

=Summer Solstice Event Series=
Firefly lantern bright, light up the midsummer night. The Summer Solstice event series is coming soon, and we have prepared exciting content for you to enjoy:
1) Midsum

title: Royal Jackpot Slots & Pokies
notes:
Dear Royal Player,

We’re constantly working to improve the game experience for you to win and have fun!

Brand new updates are below:

title: Truck Star
notes:
Ready for an exciting update?

- 100 new levels packed with thrilling challenges!
- Repair and upgrade the brand-new motorcycle [Lord of the Shadows]!
- The new limited-time vehicle modding event [Sir Clockwork] is coming soon!
- The new limited-time treasure hunt event [Treasure Quest] is coming soon!

Even more fun content is now live in the game—log in and check it out!

title: Match Villains
notes:
Celebrate loud. Play louder. 100 new levels await!

NEW ITEM: PLASMA GLOBE! One touch, sparks everywhere.

NEW COLLECTION: JULY FOURTH! Stars, stripes, and cards for celebrating.

NEW PASS: JULY FOURTH! Light up your look with a NEW STYLE.

NEW PAINT TRAIL: JULY FOURTH! Follow the sparks to BANNERS.

NEW SHRINK INC.: STATUE OF LIBERTY! Shrink the statue, claim the CHARM.

NEW CHARMS: JULY FOURTH! Spark up your banner.

NEW POSTER: TIKI TACTICS! Island vibes, clever plans.

Stay sharp, Villains!

title: Dream League Soccer 2026
notes:
It’s our Summer Spotlight update!
•Dynamic Stars – Collect Special Players, upgrading live with national team performances. Coming Soon! 
•New Facility – Upgrade your Fanzone for Clan bonuses and Stadium discounts. 
•International Football – Play our brand new “World Tournament” Event type. 
•Manager Accessories – Take control in style with North American themed items. 
•Clan Improvements – Communicate with new interactions and emoji reactions.
